name: Suprajit Engineering Limited
summary: Suprajit Engineering Limited manufactures, sells, and exports automotive cables and components to original equipment manufacturers in India, the United States, the United Kingdom, Germany, Luxembourg, and internationally. It provides control cables, speedo cables, auto and halogen lamps, non-automotive cables, and other components for automobiles. The company was incorporated in 1985 and is based in Bengaluru, India.
